creator: luciano@vespaperitivo.it
text:
It says:

readelf: open /lib/libc++.so.1 failed: No such file or directory

if I try with /usr/lib,I get:

root@mordeus:/usr/ports/print/qpdf # readelf -s /usr/lib/libc++.so.1 | grep bad_variant_access
   343: 000000000004222c    23 OBJECT  GLOBAL DEFAULT    9 _ZTSSt18bad_variant_access
   777: 0000000000060360    13 FUNC    GLOBAL DEFAULT   13 _ZNKSt18bad_variant_access4whatEv
  1436: 0000000000060370    28 FUNC    WEAK   DEFAULT   13 _ZNSt18bad_variant_accessD0Ev
  2139: 00000000000c9458    24 OBJECT  GLOBAL DEFAULT   20 _ZTISt18bad_variant_access
  2248: 00000000000c9430    40 OBJECT  GLOBAL DEFAULT   20 _ZTVSt18bad_variant_access

with /usr/local/lib, I get:

root@mordeus:/usr/ports/print/qpdf # readelf -s /usr/local/lib/libc++.so.1 | grep bad_variant_access
root@mordeus:/usr/ports/print/qpdf #
